title: MQ Review Summary
description: Structured summary of a mq-mcp review session — produced by Ollama provider or direct summarisation.

source.description: Where the findings came from: review_file, review_repo, review_diff, etc.

confidence.description: Summary confidence — low means the model was uncertain about key findings.

finding_count.description: Total number of findings the summary was derived from.

severity_breakdown.description: Count per severity label from the review output.

top_risks.description: Top risk findings in plain language — quoted or paraphrased from review output.

suggested_next_steps.description: Concrete next actions — must not include release approval or destructive commands.

learn_candidates.description: Pattern names worth extracting to learn memory — cross-reference learn_extraction.schema.json.

notes.description: Optional free-text note about the review context.
